summary: Iteration 34 - PayoutEngine and Prime Configuration testing complete. All 30 tests pass (20 unit tests + 10 API tests). PayoutEngine correctly implements Borlette 60|20|10, Loto3 500, Loto4 5000, Loto5 50000, Mariage 750 rules. Prime configuration APIs work correctly. Frontend displays Configuration des Primes section with all 6 prime fields.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> in table - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: PayoutEngine fully tested with 20 unit tests covering Borlette extraction, prime parsing, all bet types (Borlette, Loto3, Loto4, Loto5, Mariage). Prime configuration APIs tested with 10 API tests. Frontend Configuration des Primes section displays correctly with all 6 prime input fields.

details: extract_borlette_number: 4 tests - extracts last 2 digits from 1st prize
parse_prime: 3 tests - parses 60|20|10 and single values
calculate_mariage_win: 2 tests - 2 numbers in winning set with 750x

api_get_primes.details: Returns all 12 prime fields (borlette, loto3, loto4, loto5, mariage, mariage_gratuit, l401-l403, l501-l503)

api_put_primes.details: Updates single/multiple primes, validates format, rejects invalid input

api_sync_lotteries.details: Syncs lotteries from master catalog, fixes enabled_lotteries: 0 bug

api_enabled_lotteries_count.details: Returns 236 enabled lotteries (bug fix verified - was 0 before)

api_primes_display.details: Returns 6 primes formatted for vendeur display with bet_type, name, formula, description
